notes:
Canonical character registry. The single source of truth for cross-system character identity. The gauntlet (resources/games/hands/<id>.json) and Community Planned (resources/games/community_planned/agents.json) both reference characters by canonical_character_id matched against this index.

Author's discipline: when adding a new character to either system, add an entry here first. When editing canon-affecting biography, edit here. Both consumer systems should treat fields in this file as authoritative.

Not every character in either system gets a canonical entry — extras / placeholders / TBDs stay local to their system. This index is for the characters who recur across multiple system surfaces.

characters.name: Frasier Temple
characters.subtitle: the bricoleur
characters.biography: Diorama-maker, network operator. Magician in vol5, middle-aged in vol6's Planned Community. Frasier sits in the cathedral and dispatches the network; the canon roster reaches him through the BBS.

characters.name: John Frank
characters.subtitle: the counter-haunted
characters.biography: D'Ambrosio's diner. The counter. Eleven years of wiping the same spot. Faith died in '13; the second Faith is named after her sister but he calls her Faith anyway. In Community Planned John still runs the diner; in the gauntlet he plays THE LEAP at 3:47 AM.

characters.name: Elicia Duchane
characters.subtitle: the director's tic
characters.biography: Director / cinematographer. The Whispers from the Liminal cult audience. The choose-your-own-adventure episode that has been six months overdue for fifteen years. Cuts a documentary on whatever she's sent into.

characters.name: Nicola D'Ambrosio
characters.subtitle: the floor holds
characters.biography: Matriarch of the D'Ambrosio family after Dante. Aria is fourteen now. Runs the house. Stays in Graustark unless the problem is grief-shaped and large.

characters.name: Dante D'Ambrosio
characters.subtitle: the helm holds

lore_links.community_planned_role: deceased (vol5); appears only as gravity in memorial_grief problems

characters.biography: At the helm. Died in the Sinkhole. The boat that was the family's is now memory; the storefront is the family's post-Sinkhole operation.

characters.name: The Surviving D'Ambrosio Son
characters.subtitle: the floor he holds is the new one
characters.biography: The family's post-Sinkhole storefront restaurant. Sammy holds the bar. Hector holds the line. He holds the floor — when he's home.

characters.name: Mackenzie
characters.subtitle: at the loom
characters.biography: The loom. Philip in Lacombe. Relocated to Harmony Creek's phase-three model home for the loom-co-op. The fifth dispatch is the one that makes the loom unattended in Lacombe for too long.

characters.name: Mr. D. Dean
characters.subtitle: the long-game watcher
characters.biography: Table 14. Smooths his lapels. Leaves notes under hundred-dollar bills. In Community Planned, the substrate underneath the map; the tower in Small Wood. Never explained to the player. The silence is the point.

lore_links.community_planned_role: background — runs the storefront bar; absent dispatches

characters.name: Quentin / Paul
characters.subtitle: the Sunday circuit
characters.biography: Hierophant beat. Sunday circuit between St Jude's, the bandstand, the armory, and Table 17 at D'Ambrosio's.

characters.name: Jules (Small Wood)
characters.subtitle: the room above the office
characters.biography: Frasier's longest-running Small Wood contact. Eight years. Manager at the timber yard; sublets the room above the office to Frasier's network. Trusts Frasier. Doesn't, on balance, like him.
